GitHub ↗

Live demo

A genuinely interactive demo — no server. Edit the JSON payload below and the document re-renders entirely in your browser, through the same tree-assembly and HTML-render pipeline the library uses server-side (binding, clause resolution, key-value rows, signatures), minus the audit Snapshot (which needs a Node-only hash). The template and its two clauses are seeded in-memory for this page — see the Authoring guide for how a real catalog on disk looks.

Renders as you type, or press ⌘/Ctrl + Enter
MIT © Petr Puš — generated from the repository's markdown documentation.
